purpose: Example read-only supervisor state for watching repo, GitHub, worker lanes, queue, validators, stale state, and next safe action.

worker_lanes.purpose: Main control for Git, GitHub CLI, issues, PRs, commits, merges, and operator decisions.
worker_lanes.recommended_when: GitHub, PR, issue, commit, merge, or branch decision is needed.
An approved APPLY or code task is ready.

worker_lanes.purpose: Checks lane for PowerShell validators, queue checks, and repo checks.
worker_lanes.recommended_when: Validation, git diff check, JSON parse, or PowerShell parse is needed.

stale_state_rules.description: Dirty repo after APPLY means validation and selective commit review are needed.
Uncommitted files after validation require operator commit decision.
If GitHub CLI fails, continue local-only and ask operator to retry GitHub checks later.

blocked_actions: touch broker, OANDA, API keys, webhooks, real orders, or live trading

next_action_rules.next_safe_action: Use Ai_Os VALIDATION DECK and run git diff --check, then review changed files.
Use Ai_Os COMMAND DECK to decide the next approved phase or PR action.
Continue local-only and retry GitHub status from Ai_Os COMMAND DECK later.
